top_signals.title: Katayama’s Warnings, Bessent’s BOJ Backing Still Leave Yen Weak
top_signals.summary: Japan’s Finance Minister Satsuki Katayama’s warnings and Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent’s backing of the Bank of Japan to run policy “successfully” only briefly helped the yen as it continued to hover close to its weakest levels since last month’s intervention.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Morgan Stanley Japan head says BOJ hike key to strengthening yen
top_signals.summary: If the central bank fails to raise interest rates in June, that would have an impact on the bond and currency markets, Alberto Tamura said in an interview.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: EU lawmakers strike deal on US trade pact
top_signals.summary: Member states hope provisional agreement will help avert threat of higher tariffs

top_signals.title: Magnitude 5.9 quake strikes Kagoshima
top_signals.summary: The quake's epicenter was off Okinawa's main island, striking at a depth of 50 kilometers at 11:46 a.m. There was no threat of a tsunami.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Sherritt drops plan to dissolve Cuban assets
top_signals.summary: The announcement comes just days after Sherritt said it would be dissolving the 50/50 Moa joint venture.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DBJ to strengthen its investment operations
top_signals.summary: The state-backed lender announced a five-year medium-term management plan that includes supplying ¥3 trillion in risk capital, including through investments.

top_signals.title: Spying scandal rocks soccer as Southampton expelled from world’s richest match
top_signals.summary: Middlesbrough has now been reinstated ‌and will ‌face Hull City at Wembley on Saturday for the chance to win promotion to the Premier League.
